channel.title: Nuria Journal
channel.description: Reflections on Islam, product, and the craft behind Nuria.

item.title: How to perform Istikhara: seeking guidance through prayer
item.description: Istikhara is a two-rakat prayer and dua you offer when facing a significant decision. Here's how to perform it and what to expect.

item.title: Building a daily dhikr practice that lasts
item.description: Consistency in remembrance transforms ordinary moments into acts of worship. Here's how to build a dhikr practice that stays with you through every season of life.

item.title: Finding your Qibla anywhere in the world
item.description: Wherever you are, every prayer begins with one question: which way is the Qibla? Here is how to find it with confidence, and why facing Makkah matters in Islam.

item.title: Morning and evening adhkar: building a daily habit
item.description: The Prophet ﷺ taught specific supplications for morning and evening — a brief, consistent daily practice that keeps the heart connected to Allah throughout the day.

item.title: Morning adhkar: building a habit that sticks
item.description: The morning adhkar protect, orient, and ground us — but consistency is hard. Here's how to make them a lasting part of your day.

item.title: The morning and evening adhkar: a practical guide
item.description: A step-by-step guide to establishing the Prophetic morning and evening adhkar — small acts of remembrance with immense spiritual weight.

item.title: How a digital dhikr counter can deepen your daily remembrance
item.description: Dhikr is more than counting beads — it is presence with Allah. Here is how a simple digital counter can help you build a consistent, heartfelt practice.

item.title: Tahajjud: drawing closer to Allah in the still of night
item.description: Tahajjud is among the most beloved voluntary prayers — a conversation with Allah in the quiet hours before dawn. Here is how and why to begin.

item.title: Morning adhkar: starting your day with remembrance
item.description: The prophetic morning adhkar can anchor your whole day in gratitude and remembrance — and building this simple habit takes far less time than you might expect.

item.title: Making every morning count: the blessing of Fajr
item.description: Fajr is more than an alarm — it is an invitation to begin your day with Allah's remembrance. Here is how to build a Fajr habit that transforms your mornings.

item.title: How to make dua with focus and sincerity
item.description: Dua is more than a list of requests — it is a conversation with Allah. Here is how to bring genuine presence and sincerity to every supplication.

item.title: What is Halqa and how it can strengthen your deen
item.description: Halqa is Nuria's group accountability feature — a simple way to stay consistent in your practice alongside people you trust.

item.title: Muharram: a month of renewal and intention
item.description: As the first month of the Hijri calendar, Muharram is one of four sacred months in Islam — a time for honest reflection, voluntary fasting, and renewing your intentions before Allah.

item.title: Tawakkul: The Art of Trusting Allah Completely
item.description: Discover how tawakkul — complete trust in Allah — transforms anxiety into peace, and effort into worship. A practical guide for the modern Muslim.

item.title: How to find khushoo in your daily salah
item.description: Khushoo — the heart's full presence before Allah — is not an advanced spiritual state reserved for saints. It is the baseline of meaningful prayer, and it can be rebuilt one rakah at a time.

item.title: Making the Quran your daily companion
item.description: The Quran was not revealed to sit on a shelf — it was sent down verse by verse, to travel with us through life. Here is how to make it a living, daily presence in yours.

item.title: Welcome to Nuria Journal
item.description: A first word on what we are building at Nuria Technologies — and why we are sharing the journey here.
